EASTERN NORTH ATLANTIC.
COTE D'IVOIRE.
DNC 01.
1. CABLE OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL 112300Z SEP
   BY CABLESHIP ILE D'AIX ALONG TRACKLINES JOINING:
   A. 02-17.00N 003-44.00W, 01-35.00N 005-10.00W.
   B. 01-28.00N 005-02.00W, 01-42.00N 005-25.00W.
   C. 02-37.00N 004-45.00W, 04-20.00N 014-20.00W.
   WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 1775/23.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 120001Z SEP 23.
